title: verbascum × versiflorum
intro: Verbascum × versiflorum, also known as common mullein, is a hybrid species of the Verbascum genus, characterized by its tall stalks and large, yellow flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its mucilaginous properties, which make it beneficial for soothing irritated tissues and reducing inflammation. The medicinal properties of Verbascum × versiflorum include its ability to calm coughs and relieve respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Verbascum × versiflorum, such as teas and tinctures, can be used to harness its health benefits, including reducing fever, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant effects.
